About Me
Builder of things
that convert.

I'm a Web Developer and Email Marketing specialist based in São Paulo with 3+ years of experience. I bridge the gap between design and code — taking Figma files and turning them into fast, responsive, pixel-perfect pages.

I've worked with brands in the hotel industry, e-commerce, and marketing agencies, building everything from landing pages to full email automation flows. I'm comfortable with both low-code platforms and writing clean HTML/CSS from scratch.

Currently at Xtay, building campaigns and email templates. I'm looking to grow deeper into Klaviyo automation and lifecycle marketing.
